PMH presets

Social history presets

IV medications administered

Visual Infusion Phlebitis (VIP) score

ScoreFindingsSuggested action
0Site appears healthyObserve cannula
1Slight pain near site or slight rednessObserve closely
2Pain near site with redness and/or swellingRe-site cannula
3Pain along cannula path with redness and indurationRe-site cannula and consider treatment
4As score 3 plus a palpable venous cordRe-site cannula and consider treatment
5As score 4 plus pyrexiaUrgent review and treat per local policy
Use local policy if it differs. Scores 2 or above usually mean the cannula should be removed or re-sited.

Clinical Frailty Scale

Score baseline frailty rather than the acute illness state.

AMT10

1 point per correct answer · Tap Yes for correct, No for incorrect or unable
AMT10 - score pending

4AT

Rapid delirium screen /12
Use the official 4AT scoring below · AMT4 is shown automatically from AMT10 when all 4 orientation items have been answered; otherwise manual AMT4 scoring is available here
Alertness
Observe whether the patient is fully alert or clearly abnormally drowsy or agitated
AMT4
Test age, date of birth, place, and current year
Manual scoring is available if the AMT10 orientation items have not all been completed
Attention
Ask the patient to say the months of the year backwards, starting from December
Acute change or fluctuating course
Is there evidence of a significant change or fluctuation in mental state over the last 2 weeks, still present in the last 24 hours
4AT incomplete

Options

Settings

Tap a section to open it.
Release: hospital_at_home_v12_36_663_discharge_rename_release.html
Source: hospital_at_home_v12_36_663_discharge_rename_source.zip

Security

PIN, Face ID / Touch ID, wrong-PIN sound
Lock the app with a 4-digit PIN. Locks automatically after 10 minutes of inactivity.
Wrong-PIN sound effect.
Open straight into the app without the blue splash screen.

NHSmail address

Used by Email to NHSmail in reviews
Used for the "Email to NHSmail" button in patient reviews.

Shared JSON store

JSON folder, sign-in and load
Connect to the shared OneDrive JSON store used by the desktop board. Microsoft sign-in requires the hosted web app, not a downloaded file.
Creates pages in the default notebook section H@H Demo Notes and updates them a few seconds after typing stops.
Push and pull updates between devices in real time. Reload the app for changes to take effect.
Floating panel showing connection state and event log. Drag to move, tap to expand, long-press to clear.
Keeps a running record of what's been synced and when. Useful for diagnosing issues.
Recent sync activity

AI scan tools (beta)

Groq for blister / IV / bloods, Gemini for ECG
Store scan settings locally on this device. Keys stay in this browser only.
ECG Assist now uses Gemini directly from the browser.

ECG Assist log

Analysis history and debug info

Deepgram dictation (beta)

API key, formatting and dictation options
Direct browser connection for personal testing. The key stays in this browser only on this device.
Formatting & punctuation
Voice commands: “comma”, “period”, “colon”, “question mark”, “exclamation mark”, “new line”, “new paragraph”.
Built-in handling now includes around 80 common medical terms, abbreviations and UK spellings, including U&Es, LFTs, TFTs, HbA1c, HFpEF, HFrEF, DNAR, AF, AKI, CKD, COPD, UTI, CAP, CXR, ECG, Sando-K, ceiling of care and orthopnoea.
Custom phrases
These replacements are applied after dictation with more tolerant matching, and spoken forms are also sent to Deepgram as phrase hints.

TTS debug log

Speech playback events and errors

Patient list

Choose and reorder card details
Name, age and referral always stay on each patient card. Choose the other sections to show and drag them into the order you want.
Permanent: Name • Age • Referral

Clinical review

Examination and PMH presets
Customise the examination chips shown in the findings overlay. One line = one chip. Blank lines are ignored and duplicate lines are removed automatically.
Customise the PMH chips shown in the PMH preset overlay. Add one condition at a time below, then tap a chip to remove it. The Recent section still updates automatically from use.

Medication link debug

Recent long-press / link events for troubleshooting

Dictation commands

Structured notes
start issues
Starts a numbered list with 1.
next issue
Blank line, then the next numbered item
next point
New line with -
new paragraph
Blank line within the current section
end issues
Ends the numbered list
Punctuation
commaperiodcolonquestion markexclamation marknew linenew paragraph
Custom phrases
Use spoken = written, for example use and ease = U&Es or heff peff = HFpEF.
